title: Blog 主题更改
content:
今天我正式更改了Blog的主题，主要在颜色搭配和插件使用上做了调整。原来主题的颜色对我来说太过妖艳，所以我改成了更成熟稳重的配色，同时保留了赛博风格，这样更符合我的审美。

我还添加了aplayer插件，已经在本地部署了几首我喜欢听的歌。

一开始配色的灵感来源于日落后的20分钟，也就是“蓝调时刻”，但夕阳的美丽很难用几种简单的配色来完全展现出来。

经过几次试验，最终选定这种颜色搭配：

更改前的主题界面：

更改后的主题界面：

Today, I officially changed my blog’s theme, mainly adjusting the color scheme and adding some plugins. The previous theme’s colors were too gaudy for me, so I switched to a more mature and stable color palette while keeping the cyber style, which suits my taste better.

I also added the APlayer plugin and have deployed several songs I like to listen to locally.

Initially, the color scheme was inspired by the 20 minutes after sunset, also known as the “blue hour,” but the beauty of the sunset is difficult to fully capture with just a few simple colors.

After several trials, I finally chose this color combination:

The blog theme before the change:

The blog theme after the change:
